platformSchools.lead: Operate each workspace: metrics, campus admins, suspension, and irreversible tenant data removal (async job).

notificationDetail.notFound: Notification not found or you do not have access.

superAdmin.title: Super Admin Console
superAdmin.lead: Portfolio-wide visibility across schools, admins, and platform health.

portfolio.title: School Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Operational view across all school workspaces (server-paged)

admins.title: School Admins
admins.emptyLead: Admin access and operational context will appear here.

features.panelLead: Roll optional modules on or off for the selected school. Campus admins see enabled items under Settings → Features (read-only).

operationsHub.name: Operations hub
operationsHub.description: Staff, visitors, gate passes, inventory, fee reminders, payroll accrual (stub)

importExport.name: Import / export
importExport.description: Bulk data jobs and CSV exports

directory.name: Directory
directory.description: Unified staff & student search for administrators

confirm.toggleSuspendMessage: You are about to suspend {{name}}. They will lose portal access for this school until you activate them again.
confirm.toggleSuspendDetail: Students and teachers are not affected — only this administrator account for the selected workspace.
confirm.toggleActivateMessage: You are about to activate {{name}} so they can sign in again for this school (subject to other platform checks).

featureRollout.title: Feature management
featureRollout.lead: Choose a school, then roll optional modules on or off. The same flags gate backend APIs and the campus Settings → Features view (read-only for admins).
featureRollout.schoolsHint: Select a row to manage module flags for that workspace.
featureRollout.noSchools: No schools match the current filters.
featureRollout.pickSchoolLead: Pick a school from the list on the left to load and edit its module toggles.

super.scopedHint: You are not scoped to a single school tenant. Use Platform settings for your console preferences.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your school management portal
login.appLanguageHint: Saved to your account when you sign in. Change anytime in Settings → Preferences.
login.demoFlowIntro: The school code tells the API which workspace (tenant) you belong to. Choose Email & password or Phone & code, then submit.
login.demoSeededLine1: School codes: DPS-DLH or KV-MUM — password for all seeded users: admin123
login.demoSeededLine4: Super admin: superadmin@schoolerp.com · school code PLATFORM
login.demoSeededLine5: Parent emails use a unique pattern per student — see DEMO_CREDENTIALS.md in the repo or query users where role=PARENT.
login.demoFlywayBody: School code SCH001 — admin@school.com, teacher@school.com, parent@school.com — password admin123.
login.demoOtpBody: Use the mobile number on the user profile (+91… for seeded parents). With mocks, use the sample numbers your auth mock expects; with the real API, enter the OTP from SMS (or dev hint if enabled).
login.demoDocHint: Full tables: open DEMO_CREDENTIALS.md in the repository root.
login.errorPhoneOtpSend: We could not send a code. Wait and try again, or check the school code.
login.errorPhoneOtpVerify: Verification failed. Request a new code and try again.
login.errorPhoneLogin: Sign-in with phone failed. Verify the code and try again.
login.rightSubtitle: Manage admissions, academics, fees, attendance and more — from one unified platform for modern schools.
login.errorGeneric: Sign-in failed. Check your details and try again.
login.quote1: Rollout was calm and predictable — finance, academics, and parents are finally aligned on one timeline.
login.quote1Meta: Meera Shah · CFO, Lakeside Academy Trust
login.quote2: We evaluated SchoolMint-level suites; SchoolVault gave us the same depth with APIs we actually own.
login.quote2Meta: Oliver Grant · Head of Technology, Harborview Schools
login.contactLead: Guided walkthrough, RFP pack, or enterprise terms — we respond within one business day.

validation.phoneInvalid: Choose country code and enter digits only. Stored format is +country-mobile (e.g. +91-9876543210).
validation.otpMismatch: That code is not valid. Try again or request a new code.

signup.title: Create your school workspace
signup.subtitle: Provision a secure tenant, brand your portal, and invite your team — the same flow used by district-scale deployments.
signup.adminEmailHint: If you skip this, we still create your admin account using your mobile number as the primary login.
signup.phoneHintAdmin: Used for OTP sign-in and as the administrator’s phone on their profile.
signup.errorGeneric: Unable to create school workspace. Try again.
signup.contactTitle: Book a demo or talk to us
signup.contactLead: District evaluations, migration, or custom modules — same-day first response.
signup.rightSubtitle: Admissions, fees, transport, hostel, payroll, and parent engagement — modular services with a single sign-on and tenant-aware APIs.
signup.testimonial1: We retired three spreadsheets and one legacy SIS in a single term. Parents finally have one place for fees and notices.
signup.testimonial1Meta: Dr. Anita Desai · Principal, Riverside International
signup.testimonial2: Transport and hostel modules matched our audit requirements out of the box. Engineering support was exceptional.
signup.testimonial2Meta: James Porter · COO, Northlake Schools Group
signup.testimonial3: Role-based access for teachers and guardians is granular without feeling heavy — exactly what our trust needed.
signup.testimonial3Meta: Elena Vogt · IT Director, Stadt Gymnasium

validation.phoneInvalid: Choose country code and enter digits only. Stored format is +country-mobile (e.g. +91-9876543210).

admin.admissionsSnapshotLead: Key intake metrics for the same window as the trend chart.

insight.sixMonthSub: Sum of confirmed new admissions in the chart window
insight.peakMonthSub: Month with the highest intake in this series
insight.monthlyAvgLead: Mean new admissions per month in this window

teacher.noMessagesLead: New requests will appear here for quick follow-up.
teacher.classTeacherSub: {{count}} students · attendance, announcements, and parent communication
teacher.noClassLead: Once assigned, your class teacher duties appear here.

alert.feeMessage: {{amount}} is pending for {{name}}. Pay before the due date to avoid late fee.
alert.attendanceMessage: Attendance is {{pct}}% for the selected range. Check school announcements for notices from the class teacher.
alert.resultsMessage: {{count}} subject record(s) available. Overall grade trend: {{grade}}. Details are under Examinations.
alert.ptmMessage: PTM is scheduled next week. Confirm details and notices under Announcements.

kpi.childrenLinkedContext: {{count}} linked — switch above to refresh metrics for each child.

band.excellent: Excellent — well above the school’s {{threshold}}% attendance expectation.
band.good: On track — meets or exceeds the school target ({{threshold}}%).
band.fair: Fair — slightly below {{threshold}}%; check announcements for support.
band.needs_attention: Needs attention — below {{threshold}}%; please follow up with the class teacher.
band.critical: Critical — far below {{threshold}}%; contact the school for a review.

band.excellent: Strong performance — average about {{pct}}% across subjects.
band.good: Good standing — average about {{pct}}% across subjects.
band.fair: Satisfactory — average about {{pct}}%; room to improve with steady effort.
band.needs_attention: Below target — average about {{pct}}%; consider extra support.
band.critical: At risk — average about {{pct}}%; please discuss with teachers.

urgency.none: No outstanding balance for this period.
urgency.low: Balance due — next due date {{date}} ({{days}} days).
urgency.medium: Due soon — {{date}}. Pay from Fees to avoid late charges.
urgency.high: Urgent — due {{date}} ({{days}} days). Please pay or contact the office.

FEE_PAYMENT_RECORDED.title: Fee payment posted
FEE_PAYMENT_RECORDED.desc: A payment was recorded on the ledger for {{child}}.

RESULT_PUBLISHED.title: Results published
RESULT_PUBLISHED.desc: New marks are available for {{child}} under Examinations.

ANNOUNCEMENT_POSTED.title: School announcement
ANNOUNCEMENT_POSTED.desc: Check Inbox for the latest notices from the school.

academic.pageLead: Manage academic years, classes, sections, and promotion workflows

classes.viewOnlyHint: View-only: structure and class-teacher changes are limited to administrators.

homeroom.bannerLead: {{count}} class(es) in this view have no class teacher. Use the card actions or the form below.

assign.title: Assign class teacher
assign.help: Choose a class, then a teacher (or Unassigned to remove). Save updates the roster and teacher profile.
assign.rules: Each class has at most one class teacher. Each teacher can be class teacher for only one class at a time — assigning here moves them from any previous class automatically.
assign.willMoveFrom: This teacher is currently class teacher for {{class}}. Saving will clear that class and assign them here.

card.noTeacherBody: Assign a homeroom teacher for attendance and parent comms.
card.noSections: No sections — enroll students at class level only.

promotion.title: Bulk student promotion
promotion.lead: End-of-year workflow: promoted students are moved to the next grade in the database (class, section, and display names). Only active pupils are listed; inactive or alumni are skipped.
promotion.targetSectionHelp: If the next grade has fewer sections than the current one, pick where promoted students land first; you can rebalance sections afterward.
promotion.emptyLead: No students are available for promotion in the selected class

modal.initialSectionsPh: A, B, C — leave empty for whole class only

removeSection.title: Remove section?
removeSection.message: Section "{{section}}" will be removed from class "{{class}}". This cannot be undone from the UI.
removeSection.detailRule: Sections with enrolled students cannot be removed.

classTeacher.removeMessage: {{class}} will have no class teacher after you save. You can assign someone again later.
classTeacher.assignMessage: {{teacher}} will become the class teacher for {{class}}.
classTeacher.changeMessage: For {{class}}, the class teacher will change from {{current}} to {{next}}.
classTeacher.detailWillMoveFrom: {{teacher}} is currently class teacher for {{otherClass}}. That class will be cleared when you confirm.

directory.pageLead: Search teachers, students, operational staff, and school users. Quick links open the relevant module.
directory.tip: Tip: results combine live API data when mocks are off.
directory.emptyLead: Try another spelling or a shorter fragment.

list.title: Students
list.leadAdmin: Manage enrolment and student master records. Default view shows active pupils only; use status to include left/alumni records.
list.leadTeacher: Directory of active students in the school (read-only roster). Admins handle admissions, class moves, and withdrawals.

confirmDelete.title: Remove student from directory?
confirmDelete.message: {{name}} will be hidden from default active lists. The record is kept for audit and history.
confirmDelete.detailSoft: Soft delete only — data is not permanently destroyed.

form.directoryPhotoLead: Demo: browser storage. Production: same UI will call the media / student avatar API.
form.noSectionsHint: This class has no sections; the student is enrolled at class level only.
form.statusHelp: Inactive / transferred / alumni hide the pupil from default lists; soft-delete from the profile removes them from the directory entirely.
form.guardiansIntro: Add up to two contacts (name + phone together for each). Saved as guardian records and linked to the student when not in mock mode.
form.guardianNamePhonePair: For each guardian you start, enter both name and phone (or leave both empty).
form.guardianDuplicatePhone: Two guardians cannot use the same phone number — use distinct contacts or leave one blank.
form.saveError: We could not save this student. Check the highlighted fields or try again.

profile.title: Student profile
profile.attNote: Attendance summary shown for the current month.
profile.emptyMarksLead: No exam results found for this student

confirmInactive.title: Mark student inactive?
confirmInactive.message: {{name}} will disappear from default class and student lists. The record stays for history and can be reactivated.

confirmRemove.title: Remove from directory?
confirmRemove.message: {{name}} will be removed from all directory views. Use after withdrawal or per your data-retention policy.
confirmRemove.detailSoft: Soft delete only — not permanent erasure from secured archives.

list.title: Teachers
list.lead: Manage teaching staff. Bulk ZIP/CSV import is under Operations → Import / export.

confirmDelete.title: Remove teacher?
confirmDelete.message: {{name}} will be deactivated and removed from staff lists. Homeroom assignments for this teacher are cleared in the backend.
confirmDelete.detailSoft: This is a soft delete for compliance and audit.

form.noSubjects: No subjects configured for this school.
form.additionalSubjectsHelp: Use for subjects not yet in the catalog; admins can add them to the master list later.
form.directoryPhotoLead: Admin-only in this release. Demo storage matches future teacher avatar API.

confirmDeactivate.title: Deactivate teacher?
confirmDeactivate.message: {{name}} will be removed from active teaching lists and homeroom assignments may be cleared in the backend.

attendance.coverAssignmentsLead: You may mark attendance for these classes when covering for colleagues.
attendance.alertTeacherPast: This date is in the past. You can review records; only administrators can change past attendance.
attendance.alertAdminPastAfter: to change records (audit). You will confirm before saving.
attendance.hintAdminConfirm: Administrators can submit attendance when needed; you will be asked to confirm before changes are saved (same rules apply with the live API).
attendance.searchStudent: Find a student in this list
attendance.searchStudentPh: Start typing a student name to jump to them…
attendance.emptyLead: Choose a class, section, and date to start marking attendance.

errors.roleDenied: Only administrators and teachers can mark class attendance.
errors.teacherProfileLoading: Loading your teacher profile… please wait a moment and try again.
errors.adminDirectoryLoading: Loading directory… please wait a moment and try again.

confirm.teacherSubstituteMessage: You have an active cover assignment for this class and date. Submit attendance for this session?
confirm.notHomeroomTitle: You are not the class teacher
confirm.notHomeroomMessageLinked: Attendance is usually recorded by the class teacher. If they are absent or unavailable, you may still submit.
confirm.notHomeroomMessageUnlinked: Your account is not linked to a teacher profile in the directory, or you are not the homeroom teacher for this class. Submit only if you are authorised.
confirm.adminMessageHomeroom: You are signed in as an administrator. You are also recorded as the homeroom teacher for this class ({{name}}). Confirm submission for this session?
confirm.adminMessageNotHomeroom: You are not the class teacher for this group. Daily attendance is normally recorded by the homeroom teacher ({{name}}). Continue only if you are authorised to submit on their behalf.
confirm.pastMessage: You are changing historical attendance for this class and date. Use this only for verified corrections; changes are written to the server.

timetable.coversAdminLead: Assign substitute teachers for specific dates and periods. Cover rows also appear in teacher timetable views for the selected session date.
timetable.leadAdmin: Manage class schedules, teachers, rooms, and period allocations
timetable.confirmDeleteMessage: This removes the period assignment from the master timetable. You can add a slot again later if needed.
timetable.conflictClassMessage: {{subject}} with {{teacher}} is already on this class’s timetable for {{day}}, period {{period}}. You can remove that slot and save this one instead.
timetable.conflictTeacherMessage: {{teacher}} is already assigned to {{subject}} (class {{clazz}}, section {{section}}) for {{day}}, period {{period}}.
timetable.parentHint: Timetable updates are done by a school administrator.
timetable.hintAdminCoverAfter: classes for that day only (does not change the master timetable).
timetable.hintTeacherCoverBefore: Your cover assignments for the selected date appear as
timetable.hintReadOnly: Teachers can view schedules; only an administrator can add or change slots.
timetable.noSectionsClass: This class has no sections — the timetable applies to the entire class.
timetable.pickSection: Select a section to load this class timetable.
timetable.teacherGridHint: Showing all slots for this teacher across classes. Add slot picks class/section in the form.
timetable.flatListHint: (optional — same data as the grid; useful for bulk review or export)

prefs.heading: Interface & regional preferences
prefs.lead: Your language choice syncs to your account and follows you on any device.
prefs.fieldHelp: Controls menus, buttons, and system messages in the app.
prefs.saveFailed: Could not save preferences. Try again.

exams.leadStaffEdit: Teachers and admins build timetables; only admins create new exam cycles.
exams.leadParentBefore: Choose a child, then pick a
exams.leadParentTail: exams are listed but stay closed until the cycle starts.
exams.parentHelp: Only exams that apply to the selected child’s class and section appear below. List source: GET /parent/exams; per-exam timetable and marks: …/exams/:examId/schedule and …/marks.
exams.noChildrenLinked: No students are linked to your account.
exams.pickChildPrompt: Select a child above to see their exams.
exams.noExamsChildLead: When the school schedules assessments for this class or section, they will appear here.
exams.resultsNotPublishedTitle: School has not published results for this exam yet.
exams.noMarkRows: No mark rows for your child in this exam yet.
exams.noTimetableYet: No timetable published for this exam yet.
exams.staffTimetableLead: Each row is one paper: date, time window, class (and optional section), room and notes.
exams.classesHelp: Pick classes included in this exam. For each class, choose All sections or one section (classes without sections stay “All”).
exams.sectionHintSingle: This exam targets one section for this class — pick that section above for mark entry.
exams.marksScopeError: Could not load your marks-entry scope from the server. You may still try to save; the API will reject unauthorized subjects.
exams.scheduleLoadErrorBundled: Could not load timetable from the server; showing any rows bundled with the exam list.
exams.scheduleLoadErrorParent: Could not load this exam’s timetable from the server; showing any rows bundled with the exam list.
exams.scheduleSaveNetwork: — use admin or teacher role; ensure the API is running if not using mocks.

validation.rowTime: Row {{n}}: set start and end times.

fees.lead: Structures define per-class components (tuition, transport, hostel, uniform, …). Parents see the same breakdown when paying.
fees.bulkAssignTitle: Create fee records for many students at once (e.g. new term or admission batch)
fees.emptyStructures: No fee structures. Create one for each class band.
fees.bulkModalTitle: Add this fee for many students
fees.bulkWhatTitle: What happens when you click “Add fees for students”?
fees.bulkStep1: The system finds active students in the class (or section) you choose below.
fees.bulkStep2: For each of those students it adds one fee row with this plan’s amount and the due date you pick.
fees.bulkStep3: Those rows appear on the Payments tab and in the parent portal as amounts the family needs to pay.
fees.bulkStep4: No money is collected here—this step only records who owes what. You record payments later as usual.
fees.bulkStep5: If your school uses automated fee reminders, families may get a notice when a new fee is added (according to your settings).
fees.bulkSectionHelp: Pick one section if you are rolling this fee out to part of the class; otherwise leave “everyone” selected.
fees.bulkDueLabel: When should this fee be paid by?
fees.bulkDueHelp: This due date is stored on each student’s fee row. You can use it for reports, reminders, and overdue status.
fees.bulkSkipLabel: Skip students who already have this fee for the same due date (recommended). Turn off only if you intend to allow duplicate rows.
fees.bulkSkippedOne: {{n}} student was not given a new row (see reasons below).
fees.bulkSkippedMany: {{n}} students were not given a new row (see reasons below).
fees.bulkOpenPayments: Open the Payments tab to see the new rows.
fees.errComponents: Add at least one component with a name and amount.
fees.skipDuplicate: already has this fee with the same due date
fees.bulkError: Could not add fees. Please try again or contact support.
fees.confirmDeleteMessage: Structure “{{name}}” will be removed from configuration. Existing fee payment rows in the ledger are not deleted.

inbox.lead: Official school notices. For chats, open Messages from the sidebar.

chat.leadStaff: Secure messaging for teacher–parent updates, admin coordination, and support threads. Live delivery when the server is connected; same REST shape with mocks for local demos.
chat.leadSuperAdmin: Platform operator inbox: message campus administrators only. Search shows each admin with their school name and code. Same APIs as production; mocks use the platform school directory.
chat.statusWsTitle: WebSocket inbox and conversation topics push new messages without refresh.
chat.dirHelpSuperAdmin: Type at least two characters to find an active school admin. Results list name · school (code) so you can tell workspaces apart.
chat.dirHelpStaff: Search the same directory as Staff and people: teachers show homeroom context; students include parent chat when a parent login is linked.
chat.dirHelpParent: Parents can start chats only with their children's class teachers — use the child selector below (directory search is disabled for your role).
chat.plaSearchPh: Search by admin name, email, school name, or code…
chat.dirSearchPh: Type at least 2 characters (name, email, admission #)…
chat.noDirectoryData: No directory data available for your role yet.
chat.selectConversationHint: Choose a thread to load history and send messages. New replies push in real time when connected.
chat.emptyThreadHint: Open the conversation with a short note. Participants see the same thread; tenant and role checks apply on the server.
chat.composePlaceholder: Write a message… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
chat.policyFootnote: End-to-end policy: only conversation participants can read or post; switching accounts or tenants never leaks threads across schools.
chat.emptyInboxHint: Start a thread from New or wait for an inbound message. With a live backend, updates also arrive over WebSocket.
chat.threadSubtitleDirect: Direct message — only you and this contact are in the thread.

leave.lead: Request time off with full or half-day options. Track balances and history. Admins approve; teachers can review all requests.
leave.balanceFootnote: Balances follow standard leave types (annual, sick, casual). "Other" requests are not counted in these buckets until HR maps them in policy.
leave.helpOtherReason: When you choose Other, describe the situation in full in the reason box (at least {{min}} characters). HR and approvers rely on this text.
leave.errOtherReasonRequired: Please enter a clear reason of at least {{min}} characters when leave type is Other.
leave.errSubmitGeneric: Could not submit the leave request. Try again.
leave.searchMinePh: Leave type, dates, or words from your reason…
leave.searchTeamPh: Applicant id, role, type, status, or dates…

payroll.leadAdmin: Salary structures, bank disbursement, payslips & PDFs
payroll.leadDenied: Payroll is available to administrators and teachers.
payroll.disburseHowBody: this step only submits the transfer to your bank or PSP. Success/failure of the payment itself arrives later via bank webhooks or manual reconciliation; the teacher then gets SMS/WhatsApp and in-app notice from that pipeline. Until funds settle, use Mark paid on the payslip after you confirm the credit.
payroll.cardDisburseLead: Pick a teacher for a simple payment checklist, or use the table for everyone. Generate payslips for the month first, then initiate bank transfer.
payroll.generateFirst: Generate payslips for this period first.
payroll.afterBankNote: After your bank confirms, mark the payslip paid in the table below.
payroll.initiateTitle: Uses net from generated payslip for selected month/year
payroll.payslipsLead: Filtered by month/year above. PDF opens in a new tab; mark paid after you confirm the bank transfer (admin only).
payroll.accessDenied: You do not have access to payroll details.

reports.lead: Live operational reporting across performance, attendance, fees, classes, teachers, and report cards

filter.performance: Find a student in this list
filter.performancePh: Start typing a student name to filter rows…
filter.attendance: Find a student in this summary
filter.attendancePh: Start typing a student name to filter rows…
filter.feesPh: Student name, class, or status (e.g. unpaid)…
filter.reportCardSubjects: Find a subject on this card

documents.lead: List metadata; upload/download where allowed. Delete: admin or original uploader (API mode).
documents.modalLead: Store file in your bucket/CDN, then register metadata here with the public or signed URL.
documents.confirmDeleteMessage: Remove “{{name}}” from the document register. Linked files in storage are not deleted automatically.

operations.lead: Non-teaching staff, visitors, gate passes, inventory, fee reminders, payroll accrual (stub). Attendance cover assignments are under Timetable → Attendance cover.

covers.title: Attendance cover
covers.periodTitle: Helps place the cover on the teacher timetable when the class grid has no regular teacher slot
covers.conflictTitle: Another teacher is already covering this slot
covers.conflictMessage: {{name}} is currently assigned as cover for the same class, section scope, and period on this date.
covers.conflictConfirmReplace: Cancel previous cover & assign this teacher
covers.cancelConfirmMessage: The covering teacher will no longer see this session on their timetable for that date.

staff.title: Operational staff
staff.hint: Non-teaching roles (security, drivers, office). Same payload is sent to the API when mocks are off.
staff.detailCanHard: You may permanently delete this row because there is no linked user or transport route.
staff.detailCannotHard: Permanent delete is blocked until user and transport links are cleared.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.hint: Create and update rows by SKU (server upsert). Edit loads the row; SKU stays fixed until you clear the form. Remove soft-deletes on the server when not using mocks.
inventory.skuLockedTitle: Clear form to use a different SKU
inventory.confirmRemoveMessage: This will remove “{{name}}” ({{sku}}) from the active catalogue.

reminders.title: Fee reminders
reminders.lead: Outstanding balances are listed below. In production, a scheduled job sends SMS/WhatsApp/email when due dates approach; this screen mirrors that queue and allows manual enqueue.
reminders.emptyPending: No pending fee balances in the current fee ledger.
reminders.emptyQueue: No rows in the queue yet. Open this tab again to run the mock auto-scheduler for dues within 14 days.
reminders.searchQueuePh: Student name, id, channel, or status…

importExport.pillTitle: Only school administrators and platform super-admins can use this module
importExport.lead: Queue ZIP + CSV jobs in the background—no blocking. Download CSVs in the same shape for round-trip edits. See per-row outcomes and retry only what failed.
importExport.newJobLead: Pick a dataset, drop a ZIP (contains the CSV below), then queue.
importExport.dropSubBefore: or click to browse · must include
importExport.exportsLead: Download current roster data—columns match bulk import templates.
importExport.emptyJobsLead: Upload a ZIP above to run your first async import.

transport.lead: Routes, fleet, drivers, ordered stops, assignments, and live map
transport.noGps: No live GPS — showing planned area
transport.emptyRoutes: No routes yet. Add a route as admin (works with mocks or API).
transport.mapTip: Tip: use “Simulate GPS” to move the pin to a live position.
transport.stopsHelp: Define pickup/drop order now; you can edit stops later from the route card.
transport.assignStudentHelp: Choose a learner, then pick where they board and leave the vehicle. Students already on this route are hidden.
transport.assignNoStopsWarning: Add at least one stop to this route before assigning students.
transport.assignNoEligibleStudents: No students match your search, or everyone listed is already assigned to this route.
transport.confirmDeleteMessage: Route “{{name}}” will be removed. Student assignments and stops linked to this route may need to be reviewed.

library.lead: Catalog, circulation, and copy counts stay in sync when you issue or return
library.readOnlyHint: Library catalog changes and circulation are limited to administrators and designated library staff (assistant, librarian, or head).
library.fineHelp: Leave per-day rate empty to use the school default from settings / tenant config.
library.noStudentsLoaded: No students loaded. Use Refresh, or check your account permissions.
library.confirmInactiveMessage: “{{title}}” will disappear from the active catalog and cannot be issued until it is restored.

hostel.lead: Rooms by capacity (1–4 beds), live occupancy, allocations
hostel.buildingsLead: Real-time free beds per building. Add rooms against the correct hostel so capacity stays accurate.
hostel.vacateHint: This frees one bed for new allocations, same as the allocate flow.
hostel.capacityBelowOccupancy: Capacity cannot be set below current occupancy ({{n}}).

settings.leadUser: Your profile and read-only school information. Tenant changes are limited to school administrators.
settings.profileLead: Your portrait and account details — the same identity shown in the header and menus.
settings.accountDetailsLead: Your display name and phone are stored on your user record (same identity as sign-in). Email stays fixed for security; contact the platform or school owner if it must change.
settings.profileEmailReadonlyHint: Sign-in email — change only through your IT or platform administrator.
settings.profileSavedMock: Account details saved in this session (mock). Same request will call PUT /auth/profile when mocks are off.
settings.profileSaveErr: Could not save account details. Try again.
settings.branchesLoadErr: Could not load branches. Try again or check your connection.
settings.generalSavedMock: Saved on this device (mock). Same fields will sync from the API when mocks are off.
settings.uploadPhotoAria: Upload or change your profile photo
settings.photoHintManaged: Your portrait is managed by school staff — not edited on this screen.
settings.schoolCodeTitle: Used to link branches in multi-campus setups
settings.branchesLead: Schools that share your school code appear here (read-only directory). Each branch logs in as its own tenant.
settings.photoHintMock: Shown in the header and menus. Saved on this browser only until your school connects cloud photos.
settings.photoHintLive: Shown in the header and menus. Stored with your account when you save; full media sync may follow.
settings.directoryPhotoBullet1: Admins and class teachers update official photos where your role allows.
settings.directoryPhotoBullet2: Contact the office if you need a change.
settings.linkedChildrenHintLong: Pick a child to see their class, section, and homeroom teacher from the school roster. Optional photo below is only for your parent portal view — not the official record.
settings.selectChildForDetails: Select a child to view their school details.
settings.optionalPortalPhotoHint: Only shown to you in the app until the school enables cloud photos.
settings.directoryPhotosUpdatedByStaff: Official directory photos are updated by staff under Students or Teachers.
settings.contactOfficeForUpdates: Contact your school office if any detail needs updating.
settings.noOtherBranches: No other branches returned for this code.
settings.brandingPersistNote: Persists primary/accent to this browser and updates CSS variables. With API, also saves to tenant settings (school admin only).
settings.featureTogglesLeadHtml: Turn modules on or off for your school. Use Save feature toggles so changes apply on the server (or local mock store).
settings.platformModulesLead: These switches are controlled by your platform operator (super admin). They define which optional modules appear in the sidebar for your school.
settings.frameAriaOptionalChildPhoto: Optional child photo for parent portal
settings.featureFlagsSavedMock: Saved locally (mock). Same keys sync to PUT /settings/features when mocks are off.

feeReminderAutomation.name: Automated fee reminders
feeReminderAutomation.description: When a fee is recorded for a student, parents get one notice; then reminders in the last 10 days before due (every 3 days) and every 3 days after due, weekdays 9:00–18:00 only. Stops when the fee is fully paid.

transport.name: Transport module
transport.description: Manage school transport routes and vehicles.

audit.name: Audit trail
audit.description: Track all system actions and changes.

chat.name: Chat
chat.description: Real-time messaging between staff and parents.

operationsHub.name: Operations hub
operationsHub.description: Staff, visitors, gate passes, inventory, fee reminders, and payroll accrual stub.

directory.name: Directory
directory.description: Unified admin search across students and staff.

parentPortal.childrenPageSubtitle: Select a child and month for attendance; fees and receipts stay per child. Overview and guidance are on your Dashboard.
parentPortal.detailLead: This page focuses on month-by-month attendance, fee obligations, and receipts for the selected child. High-level KPIs, context, and recent activity are on your Dashboard.
parentPortal.leadBefore: Track attendance, fees, and performance. Exams, timetables, and published grades live under
parentPortal.leadAfter: in the sidebar. Fee payments are per selected child.
parentPortal.attendanceMonthHint: Summary and the table use this calendar month (through today if it is the current month).
parentPortal.resultsTileAria: Open published examination results for the selected child
parentPortal.examsBannerMid: : pick your child, then each exam’s
parentPortal.paymentActivityLead: Official receipts for the selected period (download HTML for your records).
parentPortal.emptyReceiptsLead: Adjust dates or complete a payment — ledger receipts appear here.
parentPortal.payableSubtext: Includes overdue balance and late fee.
parentPortal.payHintMocksMid: Razorpay is a preview tile — use a real parent login (useMocks: false) to run checkout.
parentPortal.payHintMocksHtml: Instant (demo) records a payment in-browser. Razorpay is a preview tile — use a real parent login (useMocks: false) to run checkout.
parentPortal.payHintProd: Card, UPI, and netbanking run in Razorpay’s secure window. The school is notified only after your bank authorizes the payment.
parentPortal.razorpayMissingKeys: Razorpay is not configured on the server (set RAZORPAY_KEY / RAZORPAY_SECRET on the API).
parentPortal.razorpayWindowHint: A secure Razorpay window opens for card, UPI, or netbanking (including bank OTP). If it did not appear, allow pop-ups or use the button below.
parentPortal.devMockHint: Dev: completing here updates in-browser mock fee state only (mock login is not a JWT).

razorpay.label: Razorpay
razorpay.hint: UPI, cards & netbanking in a secure window (production)
razorpay.hintMock: Preview tile — use real login (useMocks: false) to pay

mockpay.label: Instant (demo)
mockpay.hint: Completes in-browser — no school API (mock portal only)

err.amountPositive: Amount must be greater than zero.
err.nothingPayable: Nothing is payable for this fee right now.
err.razorpayPreviewMock: Razorpay is preview-only in mock portal. Choose Instant (demo) to record a payment, or set useMocks to false for real checkout.
err.orderNoKey: Order created but Razorpay publishable key is missing on the API. Set app.payments.razorpay.key or RAZORPAY_KEY, then try again.
err.checkoutFailed: Could not create checkout. Use valid Razorpay keys on the API, amount ≤ payable, and a real parent login.
err.methodUnavailable: This payment method is not available.
err.rzpInrOnly: Razorpay checkout supports INR only in this integration.
err.confirmFailed: Confirmation failed. If your account was debited, contact the school with your bank reference.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your school code and registered mobile number. We will send an OTP so you can set a new password safely.
forgotPassword.otpSent: OTP sent. Please check your mobile number.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: OTP verified. Set your new password.
forgotPassword.doneLead: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with your new password.
forgotPassword.heroSubtitle: A simple OTP-first reset flow keeps school accounts secure without making families or staff wait.
forgotPassword.errorSend: Could not send reset OTP. Check school code and mobile number, then try again.
forgotPassword.errorVerify: Could not verify OTP. Try again or request a new code.
forgotPassword.errorReset: Could not reset the password. Please request a fresh OTP and try again.
